title: The Christmas Writer
overview: When a bestselling lesbian Christmas author is paralyzed by writer's block after her mother's passing, she returns to her hometown searching for inspiration-and finds it in the form of a charming single mom who owns the local bookstore, forcing her to choose between the life she built and the love she never saw coming.
